arts.ttl: Chelsea subject of 'disgusting' £1.5bn claim as Newcastle United rubbish money myth
arts.sum: Whereas Newcastle's know-how and calmness has been apparent, after qualifying for the Champions League in 2023, Cole observed how a young Chelsea side have not got quite so many players with similar experience. Joe Cole would be 'disgusted' with himself if he did not take Chelsea into the Champions League after his former side fell behind Newcastle United in the table.

arts.ttl: Matt Ritchie to break Newcastle United silence as Sky Sports hand star new role
arts.sum: Ritchie still has a year left on his contract at Fratton Park but has been tipped for manager jobs in the EFL while many Geordie fans would welcome him back to St James' Park on the coaching staff one day. Regarded as a future football manager or frontline first-team coach, Ritchie has not reflected too much on his time on Tyneside after spending eight good years at the club.

arts.ttl: Newcastle and Aston Villa rise above £135m vote and TV shake-up after 'pressure'
arts.sum: The established order pushing for a greater share of international TV payments was one thing; the pot was previously shared equally between all 20 clubs only to then be distributed based on where a team finished in the league, which obviously suited the usual suspects for so long. It is far from a coincidence that Newcastle and Aston Villa were among just four clubs who voted against proposed changes to the aforementioned APT rules earlier this season.

arts.ttl: Will Southampton and Aston Villa’s past experiences put clubs off signing Genk’s Nigerian star this summer?
arts.sum: The last time a Nigerian striker scored 20 goals for Genk, he earned a move to the Premier League. In back to back seasons Paul Onuachu hit more than 20…

arts.ttl: Aston Villa have ‘already made enquiries’ for player – Possibility of summer exit ‘real’
arts.sum: A host of clubs have been linked with Fiorentina striker Moise Kean and Aston Villa are among them. Tuttomercatoweb’s Marco Conterio has pointed out the Italian’s release clause of €52m and he reports that this amount is only valid between 1st July and 15th July. The journalist believes that the possibility of Fiorentina losing him The post Aston Villa have ‘already made enquiries’ for player – Possibility of summer exit ‘real’ appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'Handed Major Boost' in Bid to Seal Deals for Rashford and Asensio
arts.sum: Aston Villa have discovered that they could still tempt Marcus Rashford and Marco Asensio to stay if they miss out on a Champions League place

arts.ttl: Goals rain down for Newcastle as young Irish January transfer signing shows class
arts.sum: Although all but mathematically impossible to gain promotion, they aim to finish the season strongly and can still influence the top of the table, travelling to The Valley this Sunday (12pm) to face third-placed Charlton before their final home game against second-placed Birmingham City. Having lost their last three in the league, it gives Mel Reay's team time to be ready to prepare for next week's trip to Bristol before the visit of bottom club Sheffield United.

arts.ttl: Fixture amendments for Matchweek 37 Premier League matches
arts.sum: *Subject to Forest's participation in the FA Cup final The list below includes the possible movement of matches involving the teams who will play the FA Cup final on Saturday 17 May, which remains an exclusive matchday with no Premier League fixtures.
